LanguageData.VFEPD_AloeVera_Succulent.description: A cultivated succulent with thick, greenish, fleshy leaves that fan out from the short stem. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AloeVera_Succulent.label: aloe vera
LanguageData.VFEPD_BunnyEarsCactus.description: A cultivated succulent with pads resembling ears of a bunny, and spines resembling fuzzy fur. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_BunnyEarsCactus.label: bunny ears cactus
LanguageData.VFEPD_Echeveria.description: A cultivated succulent forming a rosette, native to arid shrublands. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Echeveria.label: echeveria
LanguageData.VFEPD_FairyWashboard.description: A cultivated succulent with rosette forming long triangular leaves. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_FairyWashboard.label: fairy washboard
LanguageData.VFEPD_JadePlant.description: A cultivated succulent with thick, woody stems and oval-shaped leaves. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_JadePlant.label: jade
LanguageData.VFEPD_PeyotePlant.description: A cultivated succulent resembling thick buttons. Whilst not as beautiful as flowers, this plant has a very long lifespan. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_PeyotePlant.label: peyote
LanguageData.VFEPD_PincushionPlant.description: A cultivated succulent of cactus variety, with pointy spikes covering its exterior. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_PincushionPlant.label: pincushion
LanguageData.VFEPD_Schlumbergera.description: A cultivated succulent with bell-shaped flowers. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Schlumbergera.label: schlumbergera
LanguageData.VFEPD_SnakePlant.description: A cultivated succulent with stiff, green banded leaves with a yellow border. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SnakePlant.label: snake plant
LanguageData.VFEPD_SweetheartPlant.description: A cultivated succulent with heart-shaped leaves on a tall stem. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SweetheartPlant.label: sweetheart
